title: brickellia hastata
intro: Brickellia hastata, also known as the narrowleaf brickellia, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Brickellia hastata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and combating infections, due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. In herbal preparations, Brickellia hastata is often used as a tincture, tea, or infused oil to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
